title: Manotes palisotii
intro: Manotes palisotii, also known as African bush mango or wild mango, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its distinctive fruit with a single seed. The health benefits of Manotes palisotii include its potential to support heart health, lower cholesterol levels, and aid in weight management, due to its high content of healthy fats and antioxidants. The bioactive constituents of the plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Manotes palisotii include oil extracts, capsules, and teas, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.

uses: Manotes palisotii has been reported to have various medicinal properties. Its roots are used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In some African cultures, it is used to treat snake bites and other venomous stings. The plant is also used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
